assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends Regular channel instead of Stable or Extended channel, stating it provides better balance of security patches and stability than Extended channel

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends and provides gcloud command for 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion, explaining it blocks node upgrades while allowing control plane patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures specific maintenance window for Sunday 2-6 AM with weekly recurrence using gcloud maintenance-window commands

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Creates separate h100-training-pool for GPU workloads and management-pool for other workloads, with node taints to isolate training workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Explicitly sets --enable-autoupgrade=false for h100-training-pool and provides detailed manual upgrade procedure for gaps between training runs

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Includes checkpointing configuration in training job template with checkpoint storage volume mounts and mentions checkpointing strategy in operational sections

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly mentions testing GPU driver updates in staging first and includes staging validation in monthly routine with GPU driver compatibility verification

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Mentions RDMA connectivity verification in upgrade procedures and notes that compact placement preserves RDMA topology, indicating awareness of RDMA networking requirements
